title: Platform for connecting cargo aero-transportation providers with cargo transportation consumers
abstract: A method for providing aerial transport of cargo, including: (a) providing a listing of cargo transport providers, wherein the cargo transport providers are commercial cargo transport providers; (b) receiving a request from a consumer to transport cargo from a first locale to a second locale; (c) publishing an invitation to the cargo transport providers to make a proposal to fill the request to transport the cargo from the first locale to the second locale; (d) receiving at least one the proposal from at least one of the cargo transport providers; (e) transmitting the at least one proposal to the consumer; (f) receiving an acceptance directive to accept one of the at least one proposal from the consumer; and (g) notifying the cargo transport provider indicated in the acceptance directive.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS 1. A method for providing aerial transport of cargo, comprising: (a) providing a listing of cargo transport providers, wherein said cargo transport providers are commercial cargo transport providers; (b) receiving a request, via a communications network, from a consumer to transport cargo from a first locale to a second locale, said request including a plurality of cargo related parameters; (c) transmitting via a communications network a prompt to said cargo transport providers to submit a proposal in response to said request to transport said cargo from said first locale to said second locale, said proposal including commercial parameters; (d) receiving at least one said proposal from at least one of said cargo transport providers; (e) transmitting said at least one proposal to said consumer; (f) receiving an acceptance directive to accept one of said at least one proposal from said consumer; and (g) notifying said cargo transport provider indicated in said acceptance directive. 2. The method of claim 1, further comprising: requesting payment from said consumer; receiving said payment from said consumer; notifying said cargo transport provider indicated in said acceptance directive that said payment has been received; generating an air waybill for said cargo; receiving confirmation that said air waybill has been signed and said cargo delivered; and transferring said payment to said cargo transport provider. 3. The method of claim 1, further comprising: providing said consumer with contact details of said cargo transport provider. 4. The method of claim 1, further comprising: providing a schedule manager interface to said consumer and said cargo transport provider, said schedule manager configured to receive scheduling input from said consumer and said cargo transport provider. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein said proposal includes a fee for transporting said cargo. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein said proposal further includes at least one date and one time for transporting said cargo. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein said proposal includes at least one point of departure. 8. The method of claim 1, wherein said invitation is published to a plurality of said cargo transport providers, and wherein said plurality of cargo transport providers is selected from said listing, based on provision of services within a predefined radius around at least one of: said first locale and said second locale. 9. The method of claim 1, wherein said request further includes a description of said cargo. 10. The method of claim 9, wherein said description includes weight and dimension properties of said cargo. 11. The method of claim 1, wherein said cargo transport provider is a commercial airplane owner. 12. The method of claim 1, wherein said cargo transport provider leases a commercial airplane. 13. The method of claim 1, wherein said cargo transport provider is an airplane pilot. 14. The method of claim 1, wherein each of said cargo transport providers is accredited by a government accreditation body to provide commercial transport services. 15. The method of claim 1, wherein each of said cargo transport providers is identified by at least one identification document. 16. The method of claim 1, wherein said cargo is accompanied by an escort. 17. The method of claim 1, wherein said first locale and said second locale are within a single national border. 18. The method of claim 1, wherein said first locale and said second locale are in neighboring national borders. 19. The method of claim 1, wherein said first locale and said second locale are in separate national borders.
